summary: Iteration 31 - Dashboard Enhancements Complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Dashboard shows 14/14 engines, date range selector (Today/7d/30d/MTD), Top-Selling Items (8 seeded items), Labor Breakdown (7 segments: FOH Servers 32%, FOH Bartenders 8%, FOH Hosts 5%, BOH Cooks 25%, BOH Prep 10%, BOH Dish 7%, Management 13%). Scenario Planner comparison working with throughput analysis and staff breakdown.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard command-center returns labor.breakdown with all 7 segments (foh_servers, foh_bartenders, foh_hosts, boh_cooks, boh_prep, boh_dish, management)
Dashboard command-center returns pos.top_items with 8 seeded items from _SEED_TOP_ITEMS
Dashboard command-center accepts date_from and date_to query params
System health shows engines_active=14 and engines_total=14
Knowledge Engine returns 14 domains including timeline_throughput and cafeteria_dining
Scenario Planner build-scenario returns throughput_analysis with est_clear_minutes, dish_pit_racks, timeline_feasible
Scenario Planner staffing_estimate includes captains, bussers, station_staff fields
Share link creation and viewing working correctly with view count increment
Frontend date range selector has Today/7d/30d/MTD preset buttons
Frontend Top-Selling Items shows item bars with revenue and quantity
Frontend Labor Breakdown shows 7 department segments with percentages and dollar amounts
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER31_Throughput, TEST_ITER31_Staffing, TEST_ITER31_ShareTest leads during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 verified dashboard enhancements. Key features: Dashboard command-center (GET /api/enterprise/command-center) returns labor.breakdown with 7 segments, pos.top_items with 8+ seeded items, system_health.engines_active=14, accepts date_from/date_to params. Frontend shows date range selector with Today/7d/30d/MTD buttons, Top-Selling Items section with item bars, Labor Breakdown section with 7 department segments. Scenario Planner throughput analysis and share links verified in iteration 30.

dashboard_command_center.labor_breakdown_7_segments: PASS - foh_servers, foh_bartenders, foh_hosts, boh_cooks, boh_prep, boh_dish, management

mocked_apis_list: Top-selling items are seeded from _SEED_TOP_ITEMS (not from real POS)
Labor breakdown uses percentage splits of total labor cost
mocked_apis.note: POS/GL integrations are mocked with seeded data
